descriptionShort: Sports briefs including Richmond Sockeyes victories over Nanaimo Clippers and other BCJHL action.
descriptionLong: Nanaimo Daily News sports briefs from December 1987 covering multiple local and regional sporting events. Richmond Sockeyes defeated Nanaimo Clippers 11-4 with Rob Clarke scoring a hat-trick, and won 4-3 in a second matchup with Mike McCormick scoring the game-winner. Additional coverage includes BCJHL games, basketball, soccer, boxing, and hockey tournaments.
